Name: Tunday Kababi
Signature_Dishes: Galouti Kebab, Ulte Tawa Ka Paratha
Reviews: Legendary melt-in-mouth kebabs. Always crowded but worth the hype. A must-visit for meat lovers.

Name: Royal Cafe
Reviews: The Basket Chaat is massive and iconic. Great place for family dinners and street food cravings.

Name: Sky Glass Brewing Co.
Signature_Dishes: Craft Beer, Wood-fired Pizza, Peri Peri Chicken
Reviews: Amazing ambience with glass floors. Perfect for weekend parties but definitely on the expensive side.

Name: Dastarkhwan
Signature_Dishes: Chicken Masala, Mutton Biryani, Roomali Roti
Reviews: Best Mughlai food in the city. The Chicken Masala is incredibly rich and spicy.

Name: Sharma Ji Ki Chai
Reviews: The ultimate morning hangout spot. The round samosas and sweet tea are a local emotion.

Name: The Hazelnut Factory
Reviews: Beautiful interiors, pure veg cafe, and the best desserts in Lucknow. Great for dates or studying.

Name: Idrees Biryani
Reviews: Considered by many as the best Awadhi biryani in Lucknow. Sells out very fast in the afternoon.

Name: Barbeque Nation
Signature_Dishes: Grilled Prawns, Cajun Spiced Potatoes, Kulfi
Reviews: Standard unlimited buffet experience right next to campus. Great for large birthday treats.

Name: Bikanervala
Reviews: Reliable, hygienic pure vegetarian food. Good spot for North Indian thalis and chaat.

Name: The Drowning Street
Reviews: High-energy lounge in Gomti Nagar. Excellent music and drinks, but high budget.

Name: Vintage Machine
Reviews: One of the first aesthetic cafes in Lucknow. Great Italian food and strong coffee.

Name: Rahims Kulcha Nahari
Reviews: A winter morning staple. The slow-cooked meat with fluffy kulchas is unforgettable.

Name: Cafe Delhi Heights
Signature_Dishes: Juicy Lucy Burger, ISBT Makhani Maggi
Reviews: Massive portions and fun fusion food. Super close to IIIT for a premium weekend meal.

Name: Nainital Momos
Reviews: Spicy and experimental momos. A favorite hangout spot for college students.

Name: Bati Chokha Restaurant
Reviews: Authentic UP and Bihar cuisine. Pure veg and served in an aesthetic village-style setting.

Name: CG City Dhaba
Signature_Dishes: Butter Chicken, Dal Tadka, Tandoori Roti
Reviews: The closest spot to IIIT Lucknow campus. Open late, cheap, and satisfies midnight cravings.

Name: Prakash Ki Kulfi
Reviews: The most famous kulfi in the city. Rich, creamy, and served on a leaf.

Name: Mocha
Reviews: Very popular cafe with great outdoor seating. Good for large groups and long conversations.

Name: Sardar-Ji-Bakhsh Coffee
Reviews: Great alternative to Starbucks. Good coffee blends and a quiet environment for doing assignments.

Name: Chacha Jaan Biryani
Reviews: Very close to campus. Affordable and spicy biryani for a quick lunch between classes.

Name: Free Spirit
Reviews: Nice bohemian vibes with regular live music gigs. Good place to unwind after exams.
